strengths: Thoughtful adaptation of language skills in survey design to ensure clarity for participants
Effective use of interaction skills by adjusting explanations during play-testing to engage all users
Self-awareness in affective skills, demonstrated by adjusting deadlines based on productivity patterns
A mood board that clearly visualizes gameplay pillars and links directly to success criteria
A thorough CARDI-B source evaluation table showing strong critical-thinking in vetting research
Well-organized and coded research data demonstrating strong information-literacy management
Creative application of media literacy by rephrasing sources into original questions with visual aids to avoid plagiarism
weaknesses: Critical-thinking reflection lacks discussion of how the process deepened the relevance or quality of research sources
Organization reflection would be stronger with proposed tools or templates (e.g., card templates, batch-processing methods) to streamline production
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: The student applies a broad range of ATL skills with concrete, relevant examples that show their impact on research quality, design and user engagement. To enhance this section, reflections should include deeper analysis of how critical thinking improved source selection and propose specific organizational tools to optimize workflow.

strengths: A clearly defined learning goal grounded in personal interest, showing a strong link between geography passion and global citizenship development
Well-justified choice of the âPersonal and Cultural Expressionâ global context aligning tightly with the learning goal
Detailed, SMART product success criteria covering aesthetics, audience, content scope, clarity and duration
A persuasive rationale for choosing a board game, linking interactivity and authentic communication to project aims
Comprehensive short-term plan with clear deadlines, tasks, resources and completion status
An effective long-term visual plan mapping monthly milestones to support sustained progress
weaknesses: âSparks of interestâ section is overly detailed and could be more concise by focusing only on experiences directly supporting the learning goal
Prior knowledge section lists general skills but does not explicitly connect each skill to specific game-development tasks
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: The planning is robust, with a well-articulated goal, carefully chosen context and SMART success criteria. The timelines are sequenced logically and resources are clearly identified. To refine this strength, the student should streamline the interest narrative to maintain focus and explicitly tie prior skills to concrete project activities.

strengths: Insightful reflection on the global context, with specific examples (Finlandâs legal protections, CARâs cultural practices) showing deepened understanding
Balanced and insightful evaluation of most success criteria
An effective visual chart of aesthetic feedback that clarifies user responses
weaknesses: Development plans lack concrete steps for criteria that fell short of expectations
Personal-development reflection would benefit from measurable indicators (e.g., number of deadlines met) to track growth in organization and communication
Product evaluation needs more explicit linkage to collected evidence (survey data, observations) for each criterion
Feedback chartâs scale definitions should match survey question wording to avoid misinterpretation
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: The reflections demonstrate strong critical evaluation and contextual understanding, particularly in linking outcomes to global issues. To strengthen this section, the student should specify actionable next steps for unmet criteria, anchor reflections in measurable data and ensure that visual feedback tools align precisely with original survey metrics.

annotations.comment: You outline your critical thinking process well but add a brief reflection on how this improved the relevance or depth of your research sources.
You identify and adapt to language challenges in your survey, showing thoughtful application of language skills to ensure clarity.
Your success criteria evaluation is balanced and insightful; expand your development column with concrete steps for the criteria that did not meet expectations.
Your personal development reflection is comprehensive; include measurable indicators (e.g., number of deadlines met) to track future growth in organization and communication.
You demonstrate effective interaction skills by adapting explanations during testing, ensuring all players engaged and understood the game.
Link your product evaluation more explicitly to evidence collected (survey data, observations) to strengthen your conclusions against each criterion.
Your reflection on the global context is rich with specific examples (e.g., Finlandâs legal protections, CARâs cultural practices), showing deepened understanding.
Your reflection on affective skills shows strong self-awareness: you adjusted deadlines based on productivity patterns, improving your work pace.
The mood board effectively visualizes gameplay pillars and links directly to your success criteria, supporting creative decision-making.
Your organization reflection is honest; strengthen it by proposing specific tools or templates (e.g., card templates, batchâprocessing) to streamline production.
Your sparks of interest are rich in detail but could be more concise; focus on trimming to the most relevant experiences that directly support your learning goal.
Your learning goal is clearly defined and grounded in personal interest, demonstrating a strong link between your geography passion and your aim to develop global citizenship.
You have selected and justified the âPersonal and Cultural Expressionâ global context effectively, aligning it clearly with your learning goal.
Your prior knowledge section outlines general skills but doesnât link them to specific project tasks; specify how each skill will help you develop your game.
Your product success criteria are detailed and SMART: they cover aesthetics, target audience, content scope, clarity of instructions and duration. Excellent planning foundation.
The rationale for choosing a board game is well articulated, linking interactivity and authentic communication to your global context and learning goal.
Your CARDI B source evaluation table is thorough and shows excellent application of critical thinking in vetting research.
You clearly integrated information literacy by organizing and coding your data effectively, demonstrating strong research management skills.
Your short-term plan is comprehensive, with clear deadlines, tasks and completion status, demonstrating effective sequencing and resource planning.
The long-term plan visual communicates monthly goals clearly, supporting sustained progress throughout the project.
You apply media literacy superbly by transforming your sources into original questions with clear rephrasing and visual aids to avoid plagiarism.
Your chart effectively visualizes feedback on aesthetics; ensure that your scale definitions match survey question wording to prevent misinterpretation.
